title: Infosys and Roland-Garros Extend AI and Digital Innovation Partnership Through 2031
detailed_summary: Infosys and Roland-Garros announced new AI-powered digital fan experiences for Roland-Garros 2026 and extended their AI and digital innovation partnership through 2031. The announcement highlights use of Infosys Topaz and enhancements for fans, media, coaches, and players, but does not disclose financial terms or a quantified business impact for Infosys.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and Roland-Garros announced the extension of their AI and digital innovation partnership through 2031.

key_facts.fact: The new AI-powered digital experiences are set to debut at Roland-Garros 2026.

key_facts.fact: The new experiences leverage Infosys Topaz, an AI-first offering powered by generative and agentic AI technologies.
